interaction_phrase: leverage the technology developed at Institut d'Optique
occurrence_sentence: Pasqal was founded in 2019 with the vision to leverage the technology developed at Institut d'Optique in Palaiseau (France) for more than 10 years to build quantum processors based on neutral atoms ordered in large 2D arrays.
Pasqal is funded by Quantonation, a Paris based VC fund focusing on Deep Physics and Quantum Technologies.

interaction_phrase: leverage the technology developed at Institut d'Optique
occurrence_sentence: Pasqal was founded in 2019 with the vision to leverage the technology developed at Institut d'Optique in Palaiseau (France) for more than 10 years to build quantum processors based on neutral atoms ordered in large 2D arrays.
Pasqal is funded by Quantonation, a Paris based VC fund focusing on Deep Physics and Quantum Technologies.

With this in mind, Pasqal has been collaborating with Google to give access to its technology through Cirq, an open-source framework dedicated to the development and implementation of quantum algorithms on arbitrary platforms.

With this in mind, Pasqal has been collaborating with Google to give access to its technology through Cirq, an open-source framework dedicated to the development and implementation of quantum algorithms on arbitrary platforms.

interaction_phrase: discussions with and support by the team at AQT
occurrence_sentence: It is to be noted that the development of Pasqal's API has benefitted from discussions with and support by the team at AQT, an Austrian startup developing a quantum computer based on trapped ions.

Christophe Jurczak is partner at Quantonation, early stage investment fund dedicated to Quantum Technologies and Deep Physics, and founder of not for profit Le Lab Quantique.
